mapper.select: SELECT p.prodNo, p.prodName, p.price, p.discount, p.point, p.sold, COALESCE(SUM(pv.stock), 0) AS stock, p.thumb1FileId, p.sellerUid FROM product p LEFT JOIN product_variant pv ON pv.prodNo = p.prodNo GROUP BY p.prodNo, p.prodName, p.price, p.discount, p.point, p.sold, p.thumb1FileId, p.sellerUid ORDER BY p.prodNo DESC LIMIT #{size} OFFSET #{offset}

SELECT p.prodNo, p.cateId, p.prodName, p.description, p.maker, p.deliveryFee, p.price, p.discount, p.point, p.sold, COALESCE(SUM(pv.stock), 0) AS stock, parent.cateId AS rootCategoryId, parent.name AS rootCategoryName, c.name AS subCategoryName, p.thumb1FileId, p.thumb2FileId, p.thumb3FileId, p.detailInfoFileId, p.sellerUid, p.infoNoticeType, p.createdAt FROM product p LEFT JOIN category c ON c.cateId = p.cateId LEFT JOIN category parent ON parent.cateId = c.parentId LEFT JOIN product_variant pv ON pv.prodNo = p.prodNo WHERE p.prodNo = #{prodNo} GROUP BY p.prodNo, p.cateId, p.prodName, p.description, p.maker, p.deliveryFee, p.price, p.discount, p.point, p.sold, parent.cateId, parent.name, c.name, p.thumb1FileId, p.thumb2FileId, p.thumb3FileId, p.detailInfoFileId, p.sellerUid, p.infoNoticeType, p.createdAt
